---
title: "Presentation"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="page-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="page-eyebrow">RevealJS Presentation</p>
    <h1>From Clicks to Conversions</h1>
    <p class="page-subtitle">
      AI-Powered Email Personalization Strategies for MEin3D — 
      A data-driven analysis of conversion optimization in the 3D scanning industry.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<div style="background:#faf8f5; padding:5rem 0;">
<div class="container">
```

## About This Presentation

This RevealJS presentation was created as part of the **M.S. Digital Marketing Capstone** at Cal Poly Pomona. It synthesizes research, data analysis, and strategic recommendations for MEin3D — demonstrating the intersection of AI, behavioral data, and email marketing.

::: {.callout-tip title="How to View"}
Click the button below to launch the full interactive RevealJS presentation, or scroll down to read a summary of key slides and insights.
:::

```{=html}
<div style="margin:2rem 0;">
  <a href="slides/presentation.html" target="_blank" class="btn-primary-custom">Launch Full Presentation →</a>
</div>
```

---

## Slide Overview

```{=html}
<div class="row g-3 mt-2">
  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="slide-preview">
      <div class="slide-num">01</div>
      <h3>The Problem</h3>
      <p>High website traffic, low appointment conversions. What's breaking the funnel?</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="slide-preview">
      <div class="slide-num">02</div>
      <h3>Data Methodology</h3>
      <p>GA4 implementation, event tracking setup, and funnel analysis framework.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="slide-preview">
      <div class="slide-num">03</div>
      <h3>Funnel Analysis</h3>
      <p>Drop-off visualization across five stages: from landing page to form submission.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="slide-preview">
      <div class="slide-num">04</div>
      <h3>AI Personalization</h3>
      <p>How behavioral segmentation enables targeted email messaging.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="slide-preview">
      <div class="slide-num">05</div>
      <h3>Email Strategy</h3>
      <p>Segment-specific messaging frameworks and projected conversion lift.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="slide-preview">
      <div class="slide-num">06</div>
      <h3>Results & Roadmap</h3>
      <p>Projected lift by segment and 90-day implementation plan.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Key Insights

### The Funnel Problem

MEin3D's website attracted visitors — but the path from arrival to appointment booking was leaky. The sharpest drop occurred between Pricing and the Contact form (~50% drop-off), suggesting pricing created hesitation without sufficient social proof, and no re-engagement mechanism existed to recapture warm leads.

### AI-Powered Segmentation

By analyzing behavioral signals, users are segmented into four audience buckets — each requiring a different email approach:

| Segment | Signal | Email Angle |
|---|---|---|
| Gift Buyers | Holiday browsing | Make it unforgettable. |
| Personal Memorial | Emotional content | Preserve what matters. |
| Corporate | Long dwell time | Your team, in 3D. |
| Re-engagement | Form abandon | You were this close. |

### Recommendations

1. **Immediate:** Implement GA4 conversion events
2. **30 days:** Launch 4-email welcome/nurture sequence  
3. **60–90 days:** Deploy AI-assisted segmentation and personalized email flows

```{=html}
<div class="pull-quote mt-4">
  "The goal isn't to send more email. It's to send the email that makes someone think, 
  'this was written just for me.'"
</div>

<div class="skills-grid mt-4">
  <div class="skill-block">
    <div class="skill-label">Presentation Tool</div>
    <div class="skill-items">Quarto RevealJS</div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-block">
    <div class="skill-label">Data Source</div>
    <div class="skill-items">GA4 · Behavioral Modeling</div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-block">
    <div class="skill-label">Methods</div>
    <div class="skill-items">Funnel Analysis · Segmentation · A/B Testing</div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
```
